name: Voxel51
description: Multimodal data platform (FiftyOne) for curating and evaluating visual AI datasets across 3D, video, images and metadata for physical AI.

seo.title: Voxel51 — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Voxel51: Multimodal data platform (FiftyOne) for curating and evaluating visual AI datasets across 3D, video, images and metadata for physical AI.

when_to_use: Exploring, visualizing, and curating large computer vision datasets
Building dataset quality pipelines with FiftyOne open source
Analyzing model predictions alongside ground truth for debugging
Running active learning and embedding analysis on vision datasets

pros: FiftyOne is the standard for CV datasets
review.verdict: Essentially required tooling if you do serious computer vision at scale — open core keeps it honest.
review.best_for: Computer vision teams curating and debugging multimodal visual datasets
review.not_for: NLP-only teams or anyone without real CV workloads
